name: Tunnel of Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream the butter.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add sugar; beat at high speed until light and fluffy.
4. Stir in flour, dry frosting mix, and walnuts or pecans until well blended.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 12 cup bundt pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 60 to 65 minutes.
7. Test after 60 minutes by observing a dry, shiny brownie-type crust.
8. Cool for 30 minutes; remove from the pan to a wire rack or serving plate.
9. The cake will have a moist center called the Tunnel of Fudge.
